commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the workspace skill symlink audit, regression test, audit-check docs, and changelog copy so `skills.workspace.symlink_escape` checks the resolved `workspace/skills` boundary instead of the broader workspace root.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +28, Docs +1. Total +30 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main's audit still checks the workspace root while the loader accepts configured roots plus `skills.load.allowSymlinkTargets`; the PR branch narrows to `workspace/skills` only, which reproduces a false positive for documented allowed-target layouts without needing a full runtime run.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can preserve the branch while aligning the audit predicate and changelog wording; no product decision is needed.

target.title: fix(security): align audit symlink_escape boundary with skill loader
target.body:
## Summary
- align the skills.workspace.symlink_escape audit probe with the workspace skills-directory realpath enforced by the skill loader
- update title/detail/remediation copy so the finding consistently names the skills directory boundary
- add the inside-workspace/outside-skills symlink regression test without lockfile or unrelated churn

## Credit
This carries forward the narrow fix idea from @menhguin / Minh Nguyen in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/60155 and the later duplicate source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/60513.

## Review notes
Addresses Greptile's source-PR findings by making the symlink test comment match the actual symlink target and by updating the stale remediation wording.

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed

ProjectClownfish replacement details:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156898-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/60155, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/60513
- Credit: Credit @menhguin / Minh Nguyen for the narrow audit-boundary fix proposed in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/60155.; Also cite https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/60513 as a later duplicate source PR, while replacing it because it is closed, uneditable, contains lockfile churn, has failing checks, and leaves a remediation-copy gap.; Do not use #60144 as a source branch; it is security-sensitive route-only and its diff is too broad for ProjectClownfish cleanup.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed
target.author: app/openclaw-clownfish
